bookHall.title: Book the ECAA Event Hall
bookHall.description: Request to rent the ECAA event hall for meetings, celebrations, cultural gatherings, workshops, trainings, and community events.
bookHall.importantNote: Submitting a request does not guarantee a reservation. ECAA must confirm availability, requirements, pricing, and approval before the hall is booked.
